commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh In the number of all the males, from a month old and upward, were eight thousand and six hundred, keeping charge of the sanctuary. Sanctuary, with respect to the things mentioned, ver. (Menochius) The Samaritan copy observes, that they also carried the brazen laver, as we find they did, chap. All these things were folded up in the violet curtains of the sanctuary, while the ark was covered with the veil which hung before it, chap. Some pretend that the number here specified ought to be 830, to obviate a difficulty ver. But this amendment has no solid foundation.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
